allow: Bash(xcodebuild -project MicCheck.xcodeproj -scheme MicCheck -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO 2>&1 | grep -E "error:|BUILD SUCCEEDED|BUILD FAILED")
Bash(xcodebuild -project MicCheck.xcodeproj -scheme MicCheck -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="-" 2>&1 | grep -E "error:|warning:|BUILD")
